title: collomia linearis f. coccinea
intro: Collomia linearis f. coccinea, also known as the red collomia, is a flowering plant native to North America, specifically found in the western regions, characterized by its vibrant red color and linear leaves. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of red collomia include its potential to treat various ailments, such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues, due to its soothing and antimicrobial effects. In herbal preparations, red collomia is often used in teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and safety for human use.
